name: Fine Collection Report
query:
SELECT
  d.day AS `Date:Date:110`,
  COALESCE(SUM(d.raised), 0) AS `Raised:Currency:140`,
  COALESCE(SUM(d.collected), 0) AS `Collected:Currency:140`,
  COALESCE(SUM(d.waived), 0) AS `Waived:Currency:140`
FROM (
  SELECT f.fine_date AS day, f.amount AS raised, 0 AS collected, 0 AS waived
  FROM `tabFine` f
  WHERE f.docstatus = 1 AND f.fine_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
  UNION ALL
  SELECT fp.payment_date AS day, 0, fp.amount, 0
  FROM `tabFine Payment` fp
  WHERE fp.docstatus = 1 AND fp.payment_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
  UNION ALL
  SELECT f.fine_date AS day, 0, 0, f.amount
  FROM `tabFine` f
  WHERE f.docstatus = 1 AND f.status = 'Waived'
    AND f.fine_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
) d
GROUP BY d.day
ORDER BY d.day
